title: AI Publishing Profits: Passive Income Mastering KDP
author: Tony Trieu

economics.kenp_buffer_note: True ACoS effectively lower than reported because KENP page-reads add hidden revenue not attributed to ads. Treat reported break-even as ceiling.

campaign_strategy.approach: Add 2 new campaigns (Auto + Exact) on top of existing manual campaign 330597817286443 to complete 3-campaign structure. Existing 'Launching AI Publishing profit book' campaign ($20/day, ENABLED) acts as the Phrase/Manual leg but currently shows 0 spend in last 28 days — needs separate audit.

campaigns.name: Launch Auto — AI Publishing Profits
campaigns.purpose: Discovery — let Amazon find converting search terms we didn't predict. Harvest winners → Exact after 7 days.

campaigns.name: Launch Exact — AI Publishing Profits
campaigns.purpose: Own high-intent searches at controlled cost.

existing_campaign_kept.name: Launching AI Publishing profit book
existing_campaign_kept.note: 0 rows in last 28-day report → effectively dead air. Audit needed: probably default bid too low to win impressions, or keywords weak. Recommend separate /ads-manager iterate pass after new launch is live for 7 days.

review_schedule.day_3: Quick check — confirm impressions flowing on both new campaigns
review_schedule.day_8: First iteration — pause keywords with 15+ clicks 0 orders, harvest auto winners
review_schedule.day_15: Second iteration — bid scale on ACoS<35%, audit existing $20 campaign
